crossRefs.label: Remove the fuel pump from the fuel tank.
If any abnormality is found, replace the fuel sender unit.

blocks.text: Before performing an inspection Combination Meter Self-Diagnosis and check the operation of the fuel meter.
Check the fuse of the combination meter.

items.text: If normal, check for disconnection of the cord between the fuse and the combination meter.
If normal, check for disconnection of the cord between the fuse and the combination meter.
If abnormal, check for shorts in the cord between the fuse and the combination meter, as well as internal shorts in each component.
If abnormal, check for shorts in the cord between the fuse and the combination meter, as well as internal shorts in each component.

blocks.text: Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) on the left side of the driver's seat.
Select the Test Mode menu from the body electrical and check the DTC.

items.text: If DTC is not displayed, proceed to the next step "Passenger Side Front Seat Removal".
If DTC is not displayed, proceed to the next step "Passenger Side Front Seat Removal".
If DTC B1175 or B1176 is displayed, perform the indicated fault diagnosis.
If DTC B1175 or B1176 is displayed, perform the indicated fault diagnosis.

blocks.text: Remove the maintenance lid (A) and coupler (B).
6. Harness between fuel pump and combination meter Check
Turn ignition to ON mode and measure the voltage between terminals No.2 and No.4 of the fuel pump coupler.

items.text: If 12V battery voltage is present, proceed to the next step "Fuel Pump Removal".
If 12V battery voltage is present, proceed to the next step "Fuel Pump Removal".
If there is no voltage, check for a broken white or gray cord between the fuel pump and the combination meter.
If there is no voltage, check for a broken white or gray cord between the fuel pump and the combination meter.

blocks.text: Turn ignition OFF (LOCK) mode. Remove the fuel pump from the fuel tank.

refs.label: Remove the fuel pump from the fuel tank.

items: Be careful not to bend the float arm of the sender unit.

blocks.text: After confirming that the resistance between the No. 2 and No. 4 terminals of the fuel pump coupler changes smoothly by moving the float up and down, measure the resistance at the following float positions.

items.text: If any abnormality is found, replace the fuel sender unit.

refs.label: If any abnormality is found, replace the fuel sender unit.

items.text: If any abnormality is found, replace the fuel sender unit.

refs.label: If any abnormality is found, replace the fuel sender unit.

items.text: If there is no abnormality, proceed to the next step "Combination Meter Inspection".
If there is no abnormality, proceed to the next step "Combination Meter Inspection".

blocks.text: Connect the fuel pump coupler. Hold the float in the ''F'' position and put the ignition in the ignition ON mode. Check that the fuel meter pointer indicates the ''F'' position.

items: To prevent damage to the fuel meter, do not hold the float in the ''F'' position for long periods of time.

items.text: If no ''F'' location is indicated, Replace the combination meter.
If no ''F'' location is indicated, Replace the combination meter.
If position ''F'' is indicated, the fuel meter and fuel sender unit are normal.
If position ''F'' is indicated, the fuel meter and fuel sender unit are normal.
